name: R-6 react eval specs and fixtures: every per-rule fixture folder ships both a positive/ and negative/ subdirectory
command: missing=0; for d in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/fixtures/react"/g-react-*; do [ -d "$d" ] || continue; [ -d "$d/positive" ] && [ -d "$d/negative" ] || missing=$((missing+1)); done; [ "$missing" -eq 0 ] && echo positive_negative 1>&2
